rows.description: Soluta Dno Rectori, Scholaribus, et Officiariis.
rows.notes: Consensus between extractors. Clear reading from image.
rows.section_header: Soluta Dno Rectori, Scholaribus, et Officiariis.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a distinct header row. gemini-flash incorrectly merged it with the following entry. Description 'Ad Fest: Natio:' is visually confirmed.
Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description 'Stipendium' from gpt-5-mini is more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Stipendiam'.
rows.english_description: Stipend payment made at Christmas (festal stipend).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment made at Christmas, amounting to £19 0s 0d.

rows.description: Pro augment: S. New. et Mert:
rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description 'Mert:' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Merit.'.
rows.english_description: Augmentation payment for the church livings of South Newington and Merton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment for South Newington and Merton, amounting to £24 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description 'Tho Shiers' from gpt-5-mini is visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Gad Thiess'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to Thomas Shiers, amounting to £33 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description 'Tho Shiers' from gpt-5-mini is visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Gad Thiess'.
rows.english_description: Dividend or allowance paid to Thomas Shiers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend or allowance paid to Thomas Shiers, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a distinct header row. gemini-flash incorrectly merged it with the following entry. Description 'Ad fest. Annunc.' is visually confirmed.
Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description 'Stipendium' from gpt-5-mini is more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Stipendiam'.
rows.english_description: Stipend payment made at the Annunciation feast.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment made at the Annunciation feast, amounting to £31 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description manually corrected to 'Skoll:' based on visual inspection, which is closer to gpt-5-mini's 'Skell.' than gemini-flash's 'Schol:'.
rows.english_description: Payment for three shares/parts of the scholars' augmentation (school augmentation).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for three parts of the scholars' augmentation, amounting to £28 1s 10d.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a distinct header row. gemini-flash incorrectly merged it with the following entry. Description 'Ad fest. D. J. Bapt.' is visually confirmed; gpt-5-mini incorrectly read 'Sept.'.
Consensus between extractors for both description and amounts.
rows.english_description: Stipend payment made at the feast of St John the Baptist (Midsummer).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment made at the feast of St John the Baptist, amounting to £19 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description from gpt-5-mini is visually accurate. Amounts for pounds and shillings match both, but pence '0' from gpt-5-mini is visually correct, whereas gemini-flash incorrectly reads '6'.
rows.english_description: Payment for a part of the Kidlington augmentation (augmentation of the Kidlington living).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for part of the Kidlington augmentation, amounting to £10 9s 0d.

rows.notes: Description and amounts from gpt-5-mini are visually correct. gemini-flash incorrectly identified the name as 'Jae Thiess' and the pounds value as '33'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to Thomas Shiers, amounting to £38 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description 'Tho Shiers' from gpt-5-mini is visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Jae Thiess'.
rows.english_description: Dividend or allowance paid to Thomas Shiers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend or allowance paid to Thomas Shiers, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a distinct header row. gemini-flash incorrectly merged it with the following entry. Description 'Ad fest. Michaelis' is visually confirmed; gpt-5-mini added an incorrect colon.
Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description 'Witterham' from gpt-5-mini is visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Wittenham'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment to L. Witterham, amounting to £25 5s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus between extractors for both description and amounts, including the '¾' pence fraction.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment to Guinear, amounting to £22 10s 11 3/4d.

rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description 'Jun. 1.' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Jan.1.'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Merton division dated June 1st, amounting to £188 9s 5d.

rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by both extractors. gpt-5-mini correctly noted that the description field is blank on the page, unlike gemini-flash which inferred '(Subtotal)'. The pence fraction is clearly '¾'.

rows.description: Francisco Milman Med. Bac. Scholari peregrè proficienti; a Testo Annunc. ad idem Festum 1776.
rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by both extractors. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate, particularly for 'proficienti' and 'Festum', compared to gpt-5-mini's 'proficiscenti' and 'Testum'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Francisco Milman, M.B., a scholar proceeding abroad, covering the term from the Annunciation to the same feast in 1776.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Francisco Milman, M.B., a travelling scholar for the term from Annunciation to the same feast 1776, amounting to £6 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus between extractors for both description and amounts, including the '¾' pence fraction. Both notes correctly identify this as the final total.
